subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Ancient Beauty! The reply to the letter of that renowned person, that luminous lamp, shall be dispatched forthwith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم جمال قدم جواب تحریر ان شخص شهیر سراج منیر بعد ارسال مى شود حال
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
